pi_items.source: Found in install_splunk.sh data ingestion rules, task description explicitly requests it, and verifier.py checks for its presence in the dashboard XML via export_result.sh.
Task description lists 3 specific metrics to visualize, and verifier.py explicitly scores 20 points for 'panel_count >= 3'.
Found in install_splunk.sh 'user-seed.conf' pre-seeding logic and task description.
Found in install_splunk.sh 'user-seed.conf' pre-seeding logic and task description.
verifier.py uses 'POINTS_PER_CRITERION = 20' across 5 independent criteria: dashboard creation, >=3 panels, security_logs reference, scheduled alert creation, and numeric threshold condition.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub. The target index 'security_logs', minimum dashboard panels (3), Splunk credentials (admin/SplunkAdmin1!), and scoring breakdown (20 points across 5 distinct criteria) explicitly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
